upasargachandrika.example_text: na parvatAgre nalinI prarohati na hi durbaladagDAnAM kule kiYcitprarohati atra prarohaRaM vfdDyupakramamAhopacAreRa na samfDyati nEData ityAha
'goBiH paSuBiraSvESca kfzRayA susamfdDayA kulAni na prarohanti yAni hInAni vfttataH' (BA॰5.1290)
'yAste ruhaH praruho yAsta AruhaH' (aTarva॰13.18) praruhaH=aBinavAH SAKAH
'yaTA prarohanti tfRAnyayatnataH kzitO prayatnAttu Bavanti SAlayaH' (sOndara0 939) prarohanti aNkuritAni Bavanti
'tasmAd viDftA aDvAno'Bavanna panTAnaH samarukzan' (tE॰saM॰2.5.11.2) samarukzan=prakftisTA aBUvan
'saMrohatIzuRA vidDaM yaTA paraSunA'gninA na tu jYAnAgninirdagDaM praboDaviSadaM manaH' (yo॰vA॰6.12.50).. saMrohati=punA rohati=prakftisTaM Bavati saMrUQavraRaH=saYjAtakiRaM kzatam
'tato mAmativiSvastaM saMrUQaSaravikzatam' (BA॰vana॰174.1) saMrUQA dehe nimagnAH SarAH
'na KalvatikopanatvAdinA samAropitAgnitvo mARavakaH kadA cidapi muKyAgnisADyAM dahanapAkAdyarTakriyAM kartumISvaraH' (sidDahemacandrakfta syAdvAda0 15) samAropito'DyAropitaH
'yO vyAGrAvavarUQO jiGatsataH pitaraM mAtaraM ca' (aTarva0 61409) avarUQO=ita upetO=arvANmuKO prAptO
'avarohaSatAkIrRaM vawamAsAdya tasTatuH' (rA0 25296) avaroho'valambamAnAH SAKA yA BUmO punarmUlAni baDnanti amaropyAha=SAKASiPA'varohaH syAt SAKAyA avalambinI SiPA
'SaSApa putraM gAnDAre rAjyAccApi vyaropayat' (BA0 u0 14910) vyaropayat=niravAsayat
'sahasravalSA vi vayaM ruhema' (tE0 saM0 112) viruhema virohema viviDaM rohema
'vfkzasya nu te puruhUta vayA vyUtayo ruruhurindra pUrvIH' (f0 6243) pUrvIH pUrvyaH pUrvA (KilIBUtAH) vyUtayo yajYamArgAH viruruhuH punA rUQAH prasidDA aSUnyA Bavantu
'yasya yUpo virohati' (tE0 brA0 1471) virohati aNkuravAn jAyate
'prItipUrvaM mahAbAhuH prARErna vyaparopayat' (BA0 ASva0 7420) vyaparopayat vyapAropayat=vyayUyujat ararahat atyAjayat
'A yadaSvAnvananvataH SradDayAhaM raTe ruham' (f0 8131) Aruham Arukzam
'gatvA ca nAsikAM CittvA BAryAyAstAmAropayat gurunAsAM muKe tasyA na ca tatrAruroha sA' (kaTA0 6116).. Aropayat pratyavapat gurornAsA gurunAseti zazWItatpuruzaH
'CAyA hi BUmeH SaSino malatvenAropitA SudDimataH prajABiH' (raGu0 1440) AropitA'DyAsitA
'atyArUQirBavati mahatAmapyapaBraMSanizWA' (SA0 prakziptaH SlokaH) ArUQirucCrAyaH nagAdyArohaH parvatAdyutseDaH
'Arohe vinaye cEva yukto vAraRavAjinAm' (BA0 vi0 ) Aroha ArohaRam
'kxptAH sTURAH kurutArohaRAni ganDarvApsarasAM cEva SIGram yatra nftyeraMptvapsarasaH samastAH' (BA0 ASva0 1027).. ArohaRAni raNgasTalAni raNgAH

'udagrAklizwasuSlizwaM maYcArohaRamuttamam' (hari0 2288) ArohaRaM sopAnam ArohaRaM syAtsopAnam (amaraH) SroRyAmapyAroho varastriyAH (amaraH) varArohA mattakASinyuttamA varavarRinI (amaraH) samArohapariRAhA vfkzA niDAH Aroha utseDaH
'yAste ruhaH praruho yAsta Aruho yABirApfRAsi divam' (aTarva0 9263) Aruha A samantAd rohantyaH SAKAH
'taM deSamAropitapuzpacApe' (ku0 335) AropitajyamAropitamityuktam vidito vanecara itivaduttarapadalopo'tra drazwavyaH AropitapuzpacApo'DijyapuzpaDanvA tasmin
'dyo rna kAcidaTavAsti nirUQA sEva sA calati yatra hi cittam' (nE0 557)
'aDirohanti yaM nityaM piSAcAH puruzaM prati' (BA0 vana0 23052)
'vasuDA vizRupadaM dvitIyamaDyAruroheva rajaSCalena' (raGu0 1628) aDyAruroha Aruroha ArUQavatI
'budDihInopyucCritopi BUBft parE raDyAruhyamARamAtmanaM na cetayate' (daSaku0 154) aDyAruhyamARaH paravAn kriyamARaH paravattAM nIyamAnaH
'aDyAruQA KArI droRena' (pA0 5273 sUtre vfttO) KArI droRAnnyUnetyarTaH
'aDikArTavacanam aDyAropitArTavacanam' (pA0 2133 sUtravfttO) asanneva budDyA samAropito yo'rTastasya vacanam
'nAtyArohati jAtormirmahOGaH svanavAnapi' (rA0 41722) maryAdAM nAtikrAmati velAM nAtiyAti
'pfTivyA ahamudantarikzamAruham' (vA0 saM0 1767 aTarva0 18161) ucCabdo nArTe'ntaraM karoti ArukzamityevArTaH
'vArAhI upAnahA aByavarohati' (mE0 saM0 446) UrDvasTito nIcEH sTitayorupAnahoH pAdO niDatta ityarTaH hutASanaH
'na SreyAMsaM pApIyAnaByArohati' (paYca0 brA0 214) aBikrAmatItyarTaH pfTageva tO Bavata ityuktaM Bavati
'Cinnasya yadi vfkzasya na mUlaM pratirohati' (BA0 SAM0 6896)
'yaTA SreyasyAyAti pApIyAn pratyavarohet' (Sa0 brA0 4129) prakfzwavayasyAgacCati satyavaravayAH svAsanAdavataratItyarTaH
'kzatriyamAyAntamimAH prajA viSaH pratyavarohanti' (Sa0 brA0 3937) pratyavarohanti svAsanAdavataranti aByuttizWanti vA
'samAropito'rGaH pratyavaropito vA' (kO0 a0 2826) pratyavaropito'pakfzwaH avakalitaH vyavakalitaH
'apratyavarohI syAt' (kA0 SrO0 22527) pratyavaroho'ByusTAnam svAsanAdavataraRaM vA pUjyapUjAyE
'uparUQavraRaH' (suSruta0 26313) yorTo'nyatra saMrUQavraRa ityanenocyate sa evehoparUQavraRa ityanena
'vAsa upAvaroha jAtavedaH punastvaM deveByo havyaM vaha naH prajAnan' (Apa0 SrO0 682812) upAvaroha varDasva (muKenopaDamannAha) vAso vasatI rAtririti paryAyAH
